tracks.meaning: a railroad vehicle powered by an engine, designed to carry passengers or freight on rails
to teach or instruct someone to perform a skill or task through practice and instruction
a series of connected nerve or blood vessel pathways in the body, such as the digestive or respiratory tract
a series of thought processes or a line of reasoning leading toward a conclusion
to aim a weapon at a moving target and continuously adjust aim to maintain targeting
a particular sequence of events or course of action that is expected or planned
to break in or accustom a young horse or other animal to accept equipment and obedience
